notes: phase12d_one_step_kpi_update_results.csv must be written and non-empty.
Every applied action must come from phase12c_kpi_update_eligible_actions.
No excluded action may be applied.
No ES action may be applied in Phase 12D.
No HO/MRO action may be applied in Phase 12D.
No unresolved unsafe fallback action may be applied.
No rejected action may be applied.
No no-op action may be applied.
Phase 12D must not mutate the input topology sectors.
action_applied_to_clone must be true on every result row.
kpi_t_plus_1_generated must be true on every result row.
All post-action KPI values must be finite.
KPI values must lie inside physically plausible ranges.
Phase 12B already verified CIO bias does not modify physical RSRP; check inherited here.
Phase 12B already verified reference power offset shifts physical RSRP; check inherited here.
Tilt impact on RSRP is verified in Phase 12B.
phase12d_summary_by_module.csv must be written.
phase12d_summary_by_scenario.csv must be written.
No two applied actions may write the same application sector/state variable in one coordinator group.
On average across all applied actions the relevant KPI should not decline; flagged if it does.
Phase 12D orchestrator must not implement a multi-step closed-loop iteration.
No closed-loop column may appear in Phase 12D outputs.
